zh.lifeSummary: 當Enguerrand III de Coucy於1182年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯馬爾時，他的父親Raoul Ier de Coucy48歲，母親Alix de Dreux26歲。他於大約1200年與Béatrice de Vignory結婚。他去世於1243年在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯隆朋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Enguerrand III de Coucy于1182年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯馬爾时，他的父亲Raoul Ier de Coucy48岁，母亲Alix de Dreux26岁。他于大约1200年与Béatrice de Vignory结婚。他去世于1243年在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯隆朋特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): nickname from Middle English couch(e) ‘hump, hunch’, used for a hunchback. In Cornwall and Devon it is usually pronounced as Cooch.
English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Gooch  .

English (Cornwall and Devon): from Middle English coche, couche ‘bed, couch, tablecloth’ (Old French couche, culche). It could have been a metonymic occupational name for someone who made such items or a nickname for a lazy individual. Alternatively, it could have been applied to someone who produced couchwork, a luxurious embroidery in which gold or silver thread and jewels were sewn into satin or silk robes.

variants.name: Gooch
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the rare Middle English personal name Goche (also found as Joche). It was current in East Anglia from the early 12th to the early 13th centuries as a variant of Anglo-Norman French Go(s)ce, Jo(s)ce, a pet form of Old French Goscelin.
English: alternatively, a nickname from Anglo-Norman French gouge (from Latin gobio), the nominative form of Old French goujon (from Latin gobionem) ‘gudgeon’, perhaps for a gullible person.

Welsh: in southwestern England, possibly an Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’, though the sound change is irregular. Compare Gough . It may also be a variant of Cornish and Welsh Couch , with the same meaning.

variants.name: Gush
meanings: English (Devon and Dorset): probably a variant of Gudge, itself a variant of Couch or Gooch .

variants.name: Coach
meanings: Possibly also an Americanized form of French Canadian or French   Coache  .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Enguerrand III de Coucy was born in 1182, in Marle, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Raoul Ier de Coucy, was 48 and his mother, Alix de Dreux, was 26. He married Béatrice de Vignory about 1200. He died in 1243, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Enguerrand III de Coucy est né en 1182, à Marle, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Raoul Ier de Coucy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alix de Dreux, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Béatrice de Vignory environ 1200. Il est décédé en 1243, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Enguerrand III de Coucy 1182 in Marle, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul Ier de Coucy 48 und seine Mutter Alix de Dreux 26. Er hat um 1200 Béatrice de Vignory geheiratet. Er starb 1243 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand III de Coucy è nato il nel 1182 nel Marle, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul Ier de Coucy, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Dreux, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Béatrice de Vignory circa 1200. Morì nel 1243, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Enguerrand III de Coucyが1182年にフランスピカーディエイスンマルルで生まれた時，父Raoul Ier de Coucyは48歳，母Alix de Dreuxは26歳であった。約1200年にBéatrice de Vignoryと結婚した。彼は1243年に故郷で61歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンロングプオントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Enguerrand III de Coucy(이)가 1182년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 말를일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul Ier de Coucy(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Dreux(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1200년 Béatrice de Vignory(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1243년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 론그폰트에 묻혔다.

mn.Albigensian Crusade: Crusader Cemetery, יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израил

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand III de Coucy nasceu em 1182, em Marle, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Raoul Ier de Coucy, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Dreux, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrice de Vignory aproximadamente 1200. Ele faleceu em 1243, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Enguerrand III de Coucy родился в 1182 г. в местности марл, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul Ier de Coucy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Dreux, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrice de Vignory около 1200 г. Он умер в 1243 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности лонгпонт, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Enguerrand III de Coucy nació en 1182, en Marle, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Raoul Ier de Coucy, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Alix de Dreux, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Béatrice de Vignory aproximadamente 1200. Murió en 1243, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
